Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I need to consider all pairs of activities that eventually follow each other not just directly connected For a trace like A B C D I need pairs A B A C A D B C B D C D The process has 10 activities SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now I need to generate all possible pairs where the first activity comes before the second in the sequence For 10 activities there are 10 9 2 45 possible pairs

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me create estimates for each pair considering Direct consecutive activities e g SS OP Activities separated by one step e g SS RC Activities separated by multiple steps e g SS AS

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I should make these realistic for a high tech electronics supply chain SS OP Supplier selection to order placement maybe 1 2 days SS RC Supplier selection to receive components would include order placement and supplier lead time so several weeks SS AS Complete end to end process weeks to months

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: And so on for all pairs
